intent: Audio-only corrective patch: reduce distorted/loud rain, add clear-day birds, cloudy wind, and procedural footsteps.
changes: Rain audio target lowered and softened using a smoother procedural noise buffer instead of a loud full-scale white-noise bed.
Thunder bus and thunder gain preserved from V193 because user reported lightning/thunder volume as correct.
Clear daytime ambience: light procedural bird chirps, gated by weather clear, daylight, and outdoor factor.
Cloudy/rain/storm ambience: low-volume wind bed with cautious gain targets.
Procedural footsteps triggered by real player movement distance, with small floor profile differences for sand/road/grass/ground.
Console helpers exposed for ambience and footsteps toggles.
limitations: Browser/audio-device test not executed here; user should test real perceived volumes in game after first click/touch/keypress.
Procedural audio uses Web Audio and is subject to browser autoplay unlock rules.
